title: Godmode- wither rework
description: This mod entirely reworks the wither boss in minecraft, with custom loot, moveset, etc
body:
This mod aims to rework the wither
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/idSMNgyBkUs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

some things in breif
phase 1 attacks:
wither scythe- launches a scythe which tracks the player for a short time
wither rift- shoots comets at the player

phase 2 attacks:
scythe & skulls- A scythe crashes into the ground, launching skulls
dash- the boss dashes into you
Particle AOE- the boss spawns particle beams
Minions- spawns withered minions (which naturally spawn in soul sand valleys)

loot-
wither scythe
OR
wither staff
 Two nether stars
 2 music discs

 Also all the music by frosty, huge shoutout to 
 [him](https://www.youtube.com/@frostyboyee/featured)

 Also [sub to me] (https://www.youtube.com/@arch_rg)

 You can suggest changes on the linked discord server
 hope you enjoy this mod
 Here, have a cookie 🍪
